RSAT4_CSHV_eng_v2_4

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 78A
Recv ID: 7D7
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 28
Func Name: CSHV

Auto IDents

  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "AMR",
    "soft": "0210",
